# Pull Request

## Summary

Provide a short description of the changes introduced in this pull request.

Explain the purpose of the update and the problem it addresses.

---

## Type of Change

Please select the type of change this pull request introduces.

* [ ] Bug fix
* [ ] New feature
* [ ] Documentation update
* [ ] Code refactor
* [ ] Performance improvement
* [ ] Build or configuration change

---

## Related Issue

If this pull request addresses an existing issue, reference it here.

Example:

Closes #issue_number

---

## Changes Introduced

Provide a clear list of the main changes included in this pull request.

Example:

* Add new filtering functionality
* Improve movie detail page layout
* Refactor API query configuration

---

## Implementation Details

Explain any technical decisions or important implementation details that reviewers should be aware of.

Include information such as:

* architectural changes
* new dependencies
* updated environment variables
* new configuration files

---

## Screenshots (if applicable)

If the change affects the user interface, include screenshots or visual demonstrations.

---

## Testing

Describe how this change was tested.

Example:

* verified functionality locally
* tested API integration
* confirmed responsive layout behavior

---

## Checklist

Before submitting this pull request, please confirm the following.

* [ ] The code follows the project's coding conventions
* [ ] Documentation has been updated where necessary
* [ ] No sensitive information is included in the commit
* [ ] The change has been tested locally
* [ ] Existing functionality has not been broken

---

## Additional Notes

Include any additional information that may help reviewers understand the context of this change.
